visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a Costco warehouse aisle with a shopping cart; the woman on the left wears a white bucket hat and a black top, while the woman on the right has long dark hair and a brown jacket. They gesture enthusiastically at the camera with wide smiles. (2) The camera cuts to the women holding large black tubs of Red Cow Whey Protein in front of a shelf stacked with the same product. (3) A close-up shot of a price tag shows the original price of 1799 slashed to 1399 with a large 'BLACK FRIDAY' graphic overlaying the scene. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting where the two women sit at a white table with four tubs of protein powder, pointing to the labels. (5) A montage features a man performing heavy barbell squats in a gym with a cartoon face mask overlay, followed by a woman in a black sleeveless top taking a mirror selfie in a fitting room. (6) Close-up shots show a white scoop pouring powder into a shaker bottle, water being added, and the mixture being shaken. (7) Back in the home setting, the women pour the creamy brown liquid into tall decorated glasses and take a drink together. (8) A brief clip shows an elderly woman in a yellow hooded blanket appearing weak, followed by the two women holding the product and smiling broadly. (9) The final shot shows the two women in the home setting holding four tubs of protein, gesturing for the viewer to take action.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好市多黑五的秘密. (2) [Variety]: 11/24-11/30 連續七天. (3) [Variety]: 「當日限定」. (4) [Variety]: 我要多買幾罐. (5) [Slogan]: 紅牛聰勁乳清蛋白. (6) [Variety]: 黑五折扣 400元. [Slogan]: $1,399. (7) [Variety]: 全年最低價 囤貨趁現在. (8) [Slogan]: 珍珠奶茶風味 2.27公斤. (9) [Variety]: 買三罐直接省一千. (10) [Variety]: 省下今年的好市多會員卡年費. (11) [Variety]: 可以修復及生長肌肉. (12) [Variety]: 飲控保持體態的人也可以喝. (13) [Variety]: 超強飽腹感. (14) [Variety]: 吃夠蛋白質. (15) [Variety]: 可以沖64杯. (16) [Variety]: 28G的蛋白質. (17) [Variety]: 喝起來就像在喝飲料. (18) [Variety]: 許多長輩行動無力. (19) [Variety]: 也能輕鬆補足蛋白質. (20) [Variety]: 黑五最猛價格只有四天.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear throughout, 1 male weightlifter in gym, 1 female appearing as an elderly person.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a white bucket hat and a black off-the-shoulder top; the other has long straight dark hair and wears a brown jacket with a black choker.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between the high-shelved warehouse aisles of a Costco store, a modern indoor home kitchen/dining area, and a commercial gym facility.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Enthusiastic female narration starts immediately with a high-pitched, excited tone accompanied by a bright electronic pop track with a strong rhythmic beat. The sound of a busy store is faint in the background. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect marks the appearance of dates, and the vocal speed increases to a rapid promotional pace. The music remains upbeat and consistent. (3) A digital 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition to the product specifications. The narrator maintains high vocal arousal, emphasizing the discount and flavor variety with sharp articulation. (4) The clear acoustic sound of liquid splashing into a glass is heard, followed by a 'pop' effect. The background music continues with a cheerful synthesizer melody in a major key. (5) A cartoonish meme sound effect plays during the gym scene, punctuating the visual humor. The narration continues to describe health benefits with a confident, authoritative delivery style. (6) A final musical stinger and a 'ding' sound effect signal the end of the video, as the music and narration conclude simultaneously.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Special Offer -> Product Features -> Usage Scenarios -> Benefit Summary -> Final Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional advertisement designed to drive sales for Red Cow Whey Protein at Costco during a Black Friday sale. It uses energetic presentation, emphasizing a significant discount and a popular 'Bubble Tea' flavor to attract health-conscious consumers and bargain hunters.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators clearly identify the product brand (Red Cow), show the specific store (Costco), highlight price tags, and spend the entire video discussing the product's benefits and purchase details.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy social media advertisement using rapid editing and bright graphics to maximize engagement during a holiday shopping event.
